title: The Death of Morshu
description:
1991 - 2009

Morhu "The ShopKeeper" McPhereson died outside his house the morning of August 26th. He had a kind of hearth attack.

His last words were: "MMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMM".

Rest in Peace R.I.P Morshu 

1991-2009 T_T

This is the actual footage of his death, a very sad story T_T
